impacted_layer: Layer 1 ingest boundary (renderer plus connector metadata envelopes)
borrowed_pattern: strict/permissive ingest mode, minimal contract validation, run manifest
keep_native_guardrails: Strict mode remains env-toggled and reversible
change_summary: Implemented ingest boundary validation and manifest output, plus append-only connector metadata for observability.
acceptance_tests: Permissive mode drops invalid events with classified warnings
Strict mode fails digest when ingest violations exist
rollback_trigger: Any semantic drift in no-violation runs or unstable strict failures in production-like runs.
